headline: Hasbro (HAS) Valuation Check After Strong Q4 Beat And US$1b Share Repurchase Plan
summary: Hasbro (HAS) is back in focus after a strong fourth quarter that beat earnings and revenue estimates, powered by its Wizards of the Coast segment, new licensing deals, and a planned US$1b share repurchase. See our latest analysis for Hasbro. Despite a softer patch recently, with a 30 day share price return of an 8.83% decline and the stock now at US$93.40, Hasbro’s 1 year total shareholder return of 61.81% and 3 year total shareholder return of 121.99% point to momentum that has been building...
